race.comment: FABERGE TZAR (5) wound up strongly to score here last time. No harder but carries a little more weight. Has a good record this course and distance and drawn for a good run. Expected to go close again. BOLLON (2) scored back-to-back wins then started favourite last time and after settling off speed and finding traffic never came on. Better than that run and can bounce back. BEAU FACTOR (1) was placed here two back then fourth behind FABERGE TZAR last time. Meets the winner much better at the weights so should be in the thick of things. HE'S MAVERICK (6) is going well and will be winding up late. BAROCCO BAR (4) has drawn for a soft trail and is capable of a big run.
